validation.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/codex_python.ps1 scripts/run_ocp420_one_click_runtime.py "manifests + data/gold_candidate_books/full_rebuild + data/wiki_runtime_books + data/wiki_relations + data/wiki_assets + reports/build_logs" "fresh one-click runtime rebuilt after corpus reset"

powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/codex_python.ps1 scripts/materialize_active_runtime_viewers.py "scripts + artifacts/runtime/served_viewers + reports/build_logs" "materialize active runtime viewers after reset"

powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/codex_python.ps1 scripts/check_runtime_endpoints.py "reports/build_logs/runtime_rebuild_readiness_report.json" "runtime readiness after corpus/playbook reset" --ui-base-url http://127.0.0.1:8765 --output reports/build_logs/runtime_rebuild_readiness_report.json

powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/codex_python.ps1 scripts/run_retrieval_eval.py "artifacts/retrieval/retrieval_eval_report.json" "retrieval eval after corpus reset" --output artifacts/retrieval/retrieval_eval_report.json
